task_description: Implement the full product creation flow so users who create accounts can post products. This includes a createProduct server action, wiring the form component, and a become-a-seller registration flow since new users are buyers by default and need a sellers record for the RLS INSERT policy.

verification.summary: tsc --noEmit and pnpm lint both pass with zero errors. No test framework configured in this project so test_quality is skipped.
